hero.tagline: Personalised educational support • Confidence • Self-awareness • Guidance for the future
hero.title: Certified teacher • Learning coach • Guidance • Project-based pedagogy
hero.subtitle: Developing self-awareness, confidence and the ability to build a future plan.
hero.meta: 30 years of teaching • France & international • CAPES • senior certified teacher
hero.intro: As a certified teacher with 30 years of experience, I support students from primary to high school — including students with special needs — to develop confidence, self-awareness and clarity in their guidance path. My approach combines academic experience, personality insight and project-based pedagogy.
hero.micro: 3 minutes to better understand your child’s profile
hero.guide: Lumi helps you get started • Lumi guides the Four Elements test

about.title: About
about.pillars: Experience • method • tailored support • simple booking
about.session: 1h30 session by appointment, after a focused needs analysis
about.stays: + Tailor-made themed stays with specialists and coaches from my ecosystem
about.intro: Certified teacher in Modern Literature • CAPES. 30 years of experience • France & international.
about.experienceSubtitle: Strong academic legitimacy serving deeply human support
about.experienceBody: For over thirty years, I have supported students in their school and personal journeys. My career began after obtaining the CAPES in Modern Literature in 1995. Very quickly, I understood that a teacher’s role is not limited to transmitting knowledge: it also means helping young people understand who they are, build confidence and find their place. Over the years, as a head teacher and guidance project mentor, I met hundreds of students: some brilliant but stressed, others lacking confidence, and others still who could not find their path.
about.whyBody: This field experience led me to develop a broader approach. I wanted to create a support space where students can better know themselves, understand how they function and build a project that fits who they are. This is how SpotBulle was born: a place where confidence, self-awareness and guidance come together.
about.visionBody: Every student has talents, but they are not always visible in a traditional school setting. My role is to help reveal these resources, put words to students’ strengths and transform those talents into a future project.
about.methodBody: With SpotBulle, I combine my teaching experience with personality tools such as the Four Elements model and Process Communication. This approach allows truly personalized support that connects pedagogy, personal development and guidance.
stats: 30 years of teaching and student support
France & international — experience in middle school, high school and French institutions in Casablanca
timeline: 1995 — CAPES in Modern Literature • beginning of teaching career
2005–2025 — 20 years as a head teacher, including 10 years in grade 9 guidance issues
2023–2025 — Lead for Cordées de la Réussite and guidance project coordinator
Public engagement — National elected delegate for the think tank “Je m'engage pour l'École”, alongside Jean‑Michel Blanquer, Minister of Education (2017–2022)
2025 — Careers forum and Défi Industrie project in the institution
2025–2026 — Mission at Lycée français Léon l’Africain in Casablanca and development of SpotBulle
about.docsBody: CV, recommendation letter and reference documents can be made available on the site to confirm this journey, responsibilities held and the quality of support provided.
about.guaranteeBody: Support grounded in real field experience, strong understanding of school pathways, a strong commitment to guidance and the ability to build tailor-made responses, including for students who need a more individualized framework.

journey.title: SPOTBULLE JOURNEY
journey.subtitle: A method connecting self-awareness, confidence and guidance

steps.title: Personality tests
steps.text: Better understand how each student functions through the Four Elements model and Process Communication.

steps.title: Tailored support
steps.text: Each pathway is designed after a focused analysis of needs, level and goals.

steps.title: Project-based pedagogy
steps.text: Connect confidence, skills, guidance and speaking ability to turn talents into a future plan.

programs.title: PREMIUM PROGRAMS
programs.offerBody: Focused needs assessment before any proposal. Pricing and formats are built according to age, level, personality, goals and any specific student needs.

test.title: FOUR ELEMENTS TEST
test.subtitle: Know yourself better to learn better and choose better
test.body: An interactive test to identify a student’s dominant energy, learning style, relational needs, strengths and guidance pathways.

bridges.title: MEDITERRANEAN BRIDGES
bridges.subtitle: Building educational bridges between both sides of the Mediterranean
bridges.intro: I also support high-school and university students in building pathways between Morocco and France, especially between Casablanca, Marseille and Paris. This support can include international guidance reflection, understanding education systems, preparing transitions between institutions and developing educational or cultural projects.
bridges.opennessBody1: These bridges help young people discover other learning environments, broaden their horizons and build educational projects across cultures. They also rely on strong knowledge of public policy and European institutions.
bridges.opennessBody2: They can also take shape through educational stays, pedagogical projects or international guidance pathways. I can notably offer turnkey educational stays in Brussels to discover European institutions, understand public-policy challenges and foster curiosity, ambition and intellectual openness.

testimonials.title: THEY SUPPORT ME
testimonials.subtitle: Support and testimonials
testimonials.intro: Parents, students and partners can share their experience of SpotBulle support and endorse the educational approach offered.

pricing.title: PRICING & QUOTES
pricing.subtitle: Plans tailored to each student
pricing.intro: Because each support pathway is personalized, pricing is proposed after a first exchange and a precise needs analysis. The goal is to build a fair format adapted to school level, personality and objectives.

offers.title: Individual session
offers.text: First exploration session (1h30) to analyze the situation, understand the student’s functioning and define support priorities.

offers.title: Personalized program
offers.text: Multi-session pathway to work on confidence, guidance, oral expression or exam preparation.

offers.title: Workshops & stays
offers.text: Educational stays or thematic workshops organized with specialists and coaches from the SpotBulle ecosystem.

booking.title: BOOKING
booking.subtitle: A first 1h30 session to set the right framework
booking.intro: This session helps analyze the student’s situation, understand their way of functioning, clarify needs and build the most relevant support format.

gallery.title: SOME IMAGES
gallery.subtitle: Support moments and educational projects
gallery.intro: This gallery can present work moments, educational projects, workshops or educational stays carried out with students.

footer.line: Estelle Drion • Certified teacher • Learning coach • Tailored support • France & international
